title: Misatos Apartment Layout
wikitext:
[]: Misato's Apartment Layout             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed May 25, 2005 8:49 am OK, this has been bothering me for some time. What the hell is the layout/floorplan of Misato's apartment? Is there one? Is the apartment even static, or is it's layout as mallable of the Eva's height? Does anyone have a blueprint or floorplan of some description?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 25, 2005 8:54 am Yes, I have one. I guess I'd have to get an account at imageshack or whatever people use, being as my /reichu directory is currently unuseable. ::/

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Wed May 25, 2005 9:42 am Reichu wrote: Yes, I have one. I guess I'd have to get an account at imageshack or whatever people use, being as my /reichu directory is currently unuseable. ::/

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed May 25, 2005 10:16 am You don't have to register at imageshack. You just upload the image and grab the forum link after its uploaded. The image is a lonely userless one, but we'll all still be able to link to it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 25, 2005 11:16 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: You don't have to register at imageshack. You just upload the image and grab the forum link after its uploaded. The image is a lonely userless one, but we'll all still be able to link to it.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Wed May 25, 2005 11:35 am Reichu wrote: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: You don't have to register at imageshack. You just upload the image and grab the forum link after its uploaded. The image is a lonely userless one, but we'll all still be able to link to it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 25, 2005 12:24 pm Well, I talked to Monkey -- no image uploading or remote access until next month. WAHHHH! So, here you go: http://i7.photobucket.com/albums/y289/Reichu/newtype100pc_156_translated.png

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed May 25, 2005 12:26 pm 1) Go to [url]http://www.imageshack.us/[/url]. 2) Click the browse button 3) Find the image you want to upload. Select it. (Must be <1MB) 4) Click upload. 5) Wait a bit 6) In the page that appears, scroll down to link for holtlink for forums (2). Copy the link. 7) Paste it in a message here. Viola. No reg required.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 25, 2005 12:29 pm Well, too late. I went and got myself a bucket.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Wed May 25, 2005 12:48 pm Thanks, Reichu! I've always wondered what how the apartment really looked like. This will help me in writing many a crappy fanfic. Pardon my lack of Ã¼ber-1337 knowledge, but which room is Asuka's? Is she the bitch we all know and love and takes Shinji's, or is she acting OOC and agrees to sleep in the storage room? The first seems much more realistic to me...

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Wed May 25, 2005 1:01 pm Well on the first night we see Asuka stay, you can see Asuka opening the slideing door to the living room with Shinji in it. I think at a later stage Shinji get the Store room. I'm not to sure.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 25, 2005 1:20 pm No idea which one is Asuka's. One of the unsolved mysteries. I'm sure you could figure it out by vigorously studying the anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Wed May 25, 2005 1:24 pm Reichu wrote: No idea which one is Asuka's. One of the unsolved mysteries. I'm sure you could figure it out by vigorously studying the anime.

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Wed May 25, 2005 1:29 pm But weren't Asuka & Shinji sleeping in the same room (The living room) for that ep because they had to spent every bit of time together?

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Wed May 25, 2005 1:45 pm DirtyHamster wrote: But weren't Asuka & Shinji sleeping in the same room (The living room) for that ep because they had to spent every bit of time together?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed May 25, 2005 2:04 pm OK. This is officially screwed up. I remain convinced, and none shall dissuade me, that the entire "south" wall of the WC area should be moved down further to bring it in line with the door enterance, and eliminating the "overhanging" wall on the "north east" corner of the storage room. Also, I find it incredible that this apartment has passed any kind of fire safety standards. The cooking area is located directly beside the one and only exit!! It would appear Tokyo-3's fire officials come from the same stock as the engineers who designed the entry plug ejection system.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed May 25, 2005 3:20 pm Reichu wrote: Well, I talked to Monkey -- no image uploading or remote access until next month. WAHHHH! So, here you go: http://i7.photobucket.com/albums/y289/Reichu/newtype100pc_156_translated.png

[]:             Quote Post by Misuzu » Wed May 25, 2005 4:52 pm maybe Asuka moved into Misato's room or the storage room. speaking of which, that's a pretty big/good layout for a Japanese home.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 25, 2005 7:11 pm I just did some checking and, yeah. Shinji got the storage room, and Asuka took over Shinji's. What a bitch!

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed May 25, 2005 7:15 pm He was being polite, and let the lady have the bigger room. Ho wait, this is Shinji were talking about. Yep, he was a wuss, and let Asuka kick him out of his room.
